description: This file contains the implementation of the AssetsRepository class, which handles PostgreSQL database operations related to 'assets' or 'devices' in an inventory management context. The class provides methods for retrieving, listing, creating, and updating asset records, utilizing SQLAlchemy's asynchronous API.

classes.name: AssetsRepository
classes.description: Repository class for performing asynchronous CRUD operations on asset records in a PostgreSQL database.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, asset_id: UUID)
methods.description: Retrieves an asset record by its UUID.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_asset_tag(self, asset_tag: str)
methods.description: Retrieves an asset record by its asset tag.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: Lists active assets, optionally filtering by a search query, with pagination.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] create(self, doc: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Creates a new asset record in the database.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None update(self, asset_id: UUID, updates: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Updates an existing asset record identified by UUID.

ctags.name: create
ctags.pattern: /^    async def create(self, doc: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:$/

ctags.name: get_by_asset_tag
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_asset_tag(self, asset_tag: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, asset_id: UUID) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> list[dict[s/
ctags.signature: (self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)

ctags.name: update
ctags.pattern: /^    async def update(self, asset_id: UUID, updates: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/
